scenes.description: Event introduction and guest reveal sequence.
Kobo Kanaeru performs 'Anata no Koto ga Suki da nante Ienai n desu' on stage with a guitar.
scenes.song_name: Anata no Koto ga Suki da nante Ienai n desu

subtitles.original: Midnight Aurora: A Winter Idol Night
subtitles.english: Midnight Aurora: A Winter Idol Night

subtitles.original: The night shines brighter when she sings...
subtitles.english: The night shines brighter when she sings...

subtitles.original: KOBO KANAERU
subtitles.english: KOBO KANAERU

subtitles.original: Special guests are here to join the fun so don't blink
subtitles.english: Special guests are here to join the fun so don't blink

subtitles.original: KUREIJI OLLIE / AYUNDA RISU / AIRANI IOFIFTEEN / PAVOLIA REINE
subtitles.english: KUREIJI OLLIE / AYUNDA RISU / AIRANI IOFIFTEEN / PAVOLIA REINE

subtitles.original: VESTIA ZETA
subtitles.english: VESTIA ZETA

subtitles.english: SHIRAKAMI FUBUKI / SAKURA MIKO / MOCOCO ABYSSGARD / FUWAWA ABYSSGARD

subtitles.original: OURO KRONII
subtitles.english: OURO KRONII

subtitles.original: NATSUYIRO MATSURI / OOZORA SUBARU
subtitles.english: NATSUYIRO MATSURI / OOZORA SUBARU

subtitles.original: OTONOSE KANADE / TODOROKI HAJIME
subtitles.english: OTONOSE KANADE / TODOROKI HAJIME

subtitles.original: NERISSA RAVENCROFT
subtitles.english: NERISSA RAVENCROFT

subtitles.original: HOUSHOU MARINE
subtitles.english: HOUSHOU MARINE

subtitles.original: The moment we've all been waiting for...
subtitles.english: The moment we've all been waiting for...

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです。 feat. 百沙子
subtitles.english: I can't say that I love you feat. Hisako

subtitles.original: ハオ...
subtitles.english: Hao...

subtitles.original: こんなことになるなんて
subtitles.english: I never thought it would turn out like this

subtitles.original: 会う前には分かってたら
subtitles.english: If only I'd known before we met

subtitles.original: もう少しだけちゃんとした僕を
subtitles.english: I could have shown you a version of myself

subtitles.original: 見せられたはずなんだ
subtitles.english: that was a bit more put-together.

subtitles.original: どうしたらいいのかなんて
subtitles.english: What I should do

subtitles.original: 頭では分かってるけど
subtitles.english: I know in my head, but...

subtitles.original: 何気ないちょっとした言葉で
subtitles.english: Just a few casual words from you...

subtitles.original: 嬉し顔が出ちゃって
subtitles.english: ...and a happy look slips onto my face.

subtitles.original: こんなバレバレじゃ格好悪いな
subtitles.english: It's so obvious, it's embarrassing.

subtitles.original: けどこのままじゃ引き下がれないよな
subtitles.english: But I can't just back down like this.

subtitles.original: でも今も顔照れくさくて
subtitles.english: But even now, I'm feeling so shy...

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きだなんて言えないんです
subtitles.english: I just can't bring myself to say I love you.

subtitles.original: この気持ち伝わるかな
subtitles.english: Will these feelings reach you?

subtitles.original: 言いたい、言いたい、キャラじゃない
subtitles.english: I want to say it, but it's not like me.

subtitles.original: 何も言えずまたサヨナラ
subtitles.english: I say goodbye again without saying a word.

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きすぎてたまらないんです
subtitles.english: I love you so much I can't stand it.

subtitles.original: 明日こそは言えるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'll be able to say it tomorrow.

subtitles.original: あなたも僕と同じように恋してたら
subtitles.english: If you were falling in love just like me,

subtitles.original: なんて考えちゃうんだ
subtitles.english: that's what I find myself thinking.

subtitles.original: 会えない日が続いてる
subtitles.english: The days we can't meet keep going on.

subtitles.original: このままじゃよろしくない
subtitles.english: It's not looking good at this rate.

subtitles.original: 会ったところで何ができるって
subtitles.english: Even if we met, what could I do?

subtitles.original: わけじゃないんだけど
subtitles.english: It's not that I have a plan, but...

subtitles.original: こんな恋は二度とないな
subtitles.english: A love like this will never happen again.

subtitles.original: 頭では分かってるけど
subtitles.english: I know in my head, but...

subtitles.original: 眩しすぎその笑顔が
subtitles.english: Your smile is just too dazzling...

subtitles.original: 僕を焦らせるんだ
subtitles.english: ...and it makes me panic.

subtitles.original: ずっと見ていたくなるような
subtitles.english: Like I want to keep looking at you forever,

subtitles.original: 目を逸らしたくなってしまうような
subtitles.english: like I want to turn my eyes away...

subtitles.original: こんな気持ち分かるのかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if you understand this feeling.

subtitles.original: あなたが笑ってるならそれでいいんです
subtitles.english: If you're smiling, then that's enough.

subtitles.original: でも隣は僕がいいな
subtitles.english: But I wish it were me by your side.

subtitles.original: もしかしたら実はずっと気づいてるんじゃないかな
subtitles.english: Could it be that you've actually known all along?

subtitles.original: あなたのことが好きすぎてたまらないんです
subtitles.english: I love you so much I can't stand it.
